meaning: adj.涓嶅惈濂剁殑,闈炰钩鍒剁殑
examples: 1 cup grain-sweetened, nondairy chocolate or carob chips.
Nondairy coffee creamer, pickles, relish, cheese sauce, egg substitutes, soups, baby foods, specialty sauces.
Fruit ices (nondairy frozen desserts) were introduced into Europe from the East sometime after being first described by Marco Polo in his journals.
Thando, a movie-star beautiful 19-year-old in a short skirt and long braids, winced at the idea that Americans would eat nondairy ice cream.
